textByHash.0e4613f7bc72262671e1b68d02523e621d059152: Well, just make sure there's no funny business going on that's all I can say. Do you know why?
textByHash.12f4aace63f41a173ee1ab7f6bfb1ad79e00aad1: She deserves someone of character, wit and repose.
textByHash.13f175b5ae2f3843f2b51edc46befa296d7be532: There's no need to guess! You can see it in my hawk like eyes, in my cat like ears and my dog like nose...
textByHash.20278e5ca382ecc08c1b33426e8284740a9d082b: My poor Juliet....she's dead...dead! I shouldn't have been so hard on her...she was my lovely daughter. Booo hoooo hooooo!
textByHash.39ffd99633835f1589a6898781021b55f2203e9e: What are you doing in my house...why the impertinence...the sheer cheek...how dare you violate my personal lodgings....
textByHash.3f73f220d9f0ac1616431c06ec1f70691ca462ff: Sharp? I've seen keener wit in root vegetables. Anyway, stop changing the subject. Get out of here and don't think you can sneak up those stairs to see Juliet, because I'll catch you and then you'll be for it!
textByHash.4a86433c0a4bfed9b7c1c4eb35c6e3d810b2add4: If you started with what's right with him, you'd have much less to consider!
textByHash.4cc683dd17067d9e2d4ebec0828e95d00f3bf4e3: What are you doing here? Snooping around...
textByHash.6abfaf870b954b602b1c8ec4d549473818ba2fcd: What! Someone may fall in love with me...what are you trying to insinuate?
textByHash.6c62ff0bcb7db15f8e168c7dfa36fa56c40f5c34: Oh no! My poor daughter...what has become of you?
textByHash.6e816b7eab60a687c31ed9892fd1c0ea8740a647: He's been trying to wooo my daughter for an age. Up until now she's had the good sense to just ignore him. I just don't know what's gotten into her recently so that she would give him the time of day.
textByHash.96e8cb97364d931d92f24890fe82b6baf4f74acf: Do you live here? If so, how's about a couple of hundred gold towards the rent eh? Pay your share I say...you don't want to be like that freeloading Romeo!
textByHash.9950bf6bb982ab98ffed44b0bcc5ceb4d5a8dacd: Wrong! What's wrong with him...have you actually talked to him? He's nothing but a dim witted upperclass twit, totally useless.
textByHash.99d19aed19aa02e9b7e1a81b1ac7974193c28e06: ...Hang on! Enough of that smiley talk. I have a daughter and I know what she's like. Don't even think of carrying on anything behind my back, I have the eyes of a hawk, nothing gets past me!
textByHash.a23e58a8dcd9a1687967305ff9623a95418a0c4e: Just looking around! This is MY house! You might have at least 'ASKED' to view my considerably well appointed abode...but no, you've just burst in with all the elegance of a Troll at a tea party.
textByHash.a713739d89d73bd8ce268475811165ad8f50313f: Sleep...! How can you even think of such a thing at a time like this? And I hope you have no intentions of sleeping in my house!
textByHash.a76b6f4aca45c018db1973358a75ddbcee9d5763: Hey! What's that in your hands? Looks like some sort of potion to me!
textByHash.b19d487612d8a5ea0ba4251cd0cabbeb69f5cfb8: Well get out! Get out....this is my house....and don't go near my daughter Juliet...she's grounded in her room to keep her away from that good for nothing Romeo.
textByHash.b9aebc8da59d8c4f8143a5079bbf3e8f3e5caa81: Hey , what are you doing here?
textByHash.c34a7704aa604e7663cc6c1b2c5c6efa020aec23: Oh...why, thank you...I've always tried to my best...
textByHash.c38002bf14307bb87aeb7cb410f02c3565183617: What...what...Romeo! Why that good for nothing swine...he's always trying to get the affections of my daughter..that soppy, half brained nincompoop won't ever have the heart of my daughter.
textByHash.c3cfe8543169c7b0a39e3d4db3b5133b54f23a6d: You'll get a bill for rent if I catch you dozing off around here!
textByHash.da1690a67eec76c13ded58e29fb8256519bef757: If he threw a stone at the ground, he'd probably miss! He's totally invisible when it's raining because he's so wet!
textByHash.db6dfd50f4d5b7cc910f099c93401e6a48114049: What are you doing in my house? Up to no good I shouldn't wonder!
textByHash.dd408b4a73a3cfbdbc63cbd0d78776bd3e644fb1: Harsh but fair I think you'll find...now get OUT!
textByHash.e3cb658207696e152d6aa0d659344bf5101d28ed: What on earth about? I hope you're not in cahoots with that good for nothing Romeo!
textByHash.e8d91cf6f7084e05c9ec9d3f88ffa1ae1dc4643b: Groceries!...at a time like this, does that girl know what she's putting me through!
textByHash.eb714133f62fd5c51c021b6cdf56b46536117486: I suppose you're quite pleased with yourself now...
textByHash.f0ed1fd6e6f84c478ec089911140a790b76bde24: Hey! What's that in your hands...looks like a message to me...with Juliet's barely legible scrawl on it...
textByHash.fa594f70245d4ed6f5925fb51861391bf3dffc71: NO! Not look like an animal! I have the keen 'SENSES' of an animal and I don't miss a thing. Don't even think about trying anything!
